research_question: What is the comparative efficacy and safety of proton pump inhibitors (omeprazole, lansoprazole, pantoprazole, rabeprazole, esomeprazole) compared to other PPIs, H2 receptor antagonists, prokinetic agents, antacids, placebo, surgery, or antibiotics in adult outpatients with gastroesophageal reflux disease, peptic ulcer disease, or NSAID-induced ulcers?
